name: cart_page_4_cart

observed_strengths.observation: 'Featured collection' H2 in cart page structure — product recommendation section exists in cart template
'STAY BOLD, STAY CAFFEINATED. SIGN UP AND SAVE 20% OFF YOUR FIRST ORDER' email capture H2 in cart — email acquisition attempted even at cart stage
'Have an account?' H2 — account login option in cart enables logged-in purchase history tracking

missing_or_weak.observation: Journey confirms cart_upsell_present: false despite 'Featured collection' section — recommendations don't populate when cart is loaded empty; actual behavior with coffee in cart is unverified
No urgency signal in cart (urgency_elements_present: false) — no free shipping progress bar or countdown despite being a repeat-purchase category where free shipping is a strong AOV driver
Cart email capture says '20% OFF YOUR FIRST ORDER' — but this conflicts with existing customers who are logged in; should show different offer to returning customers

purchase_path_notes: Cart has a featured collection section and email capture — both are positive. Journey was frictionless (3 clicks, trust badges). The upsell not populating may be a timing or inventory issue with empty cart state.
